ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Runs a Prompt Builder template for a single record and returns the generated text, so an MCP client or agent can generate grounded content on demand.
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: PromptTemplateMcpService
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: 3.0.0 info: title: PromptTemplateMcpService description: Runs a Prompt Builder template for a single record and returns the generated text, so an MCP client or agent can generate grounded content on demand. version: '1.0.0' servers: - url: /services/aura-controllers/custom paths: /runPromptTemplate: post: operationId: runPromptTemplate summary: Run a prompt template description: Runs a Prompt Builder template against a single record and returns the generated text. Use to generate grounded content — a summary, an outreach email, a recommendation — for a specific record by naming the prompt template and the record that grounds it. x-sfdc: agent: action: publishAsAgentAction: true requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object required: - templateName - recordId properties: templateName: title: Template Name description: Developer name (or Id) of the prompt template to run. Required. type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: true isUserInput: true recordId: title: Record Id description: Id of the record that grounds the template. Required. type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: true isUserInput: true inputParameterName: title: Input Parameter Name description: Reference name of the template input (e.g. "Input:Account"). Omit to default to Input:Account. type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: false isUserInput: true responses: '200': description: The generated text plus success / error details. content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/PromptResult' components: schemas: PromptResult: type: object properties: isSuccess: type: boolean description: True when the template generated content successfully. responseText: type: string description: The generated text returned by the prompt template. errorMessage: type: string description: Populated when generation failed or returned no content.
